_provenance: Captured READ-ONLY from live alphabot_state.db on 2026-06-04 (advisor-fix cycle). Hash<->name pairs come from bot_state (the AC-4 modal ID-mismatch ground truth: route passes the Composer hash, rows are keyed by the lowercased name). autotune_runs_with_null_s_count rows show s_count=None on pre-migration rows — the exact OC TypeError('>' not supported between NoneType and int) trigger at overfitting_conscience.py:105 (s = max(s, s_count)) that produced ZERO OVERFITTING_CONSCIENCE rows across 1678 autotune_runs. This fixture carries ONLY identity/key data + the null-s_count shape; it deliberately holds NO producer-computed verdicts/ratios/dollars (per feedback_no_hardcoded_test_values).
canonical_symphony_id_rule: database.normalize_name(name) == name.strip().lower(). Producers persist this; advisor_observations.symphony_id stores this; the modal route MUST query by this, NOT the Composer hash.
